## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, and `npm test` pass
- [ ] New source files carry the SPDX header (`// SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed
